title: andropogon gerardi var. chrysocomus
intro: Andropogon gerardi var. chrysocomus, commonly known as buffalo grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Andropogon gerardi var. chrysocomus include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
